title: Rich Uruguayan Tiger Shrimp Bowl
description: A creamy, yeasty, low-glycemic bowl featuring raw tiger shrimp, coconut yogurt, and fresh veggies.
instructions: Rinse the raw tiger shrimp under cold water and pat dry with a paper towel.
In a bowl, whisk together coconut yogurt, lime juice, Dijon mustard, minced garlic, olive oil, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Toss the shrimp with the yogurt sauce until fully coated, then refrigerate for 15 minutes.
While the shrimp marinates, dice the avocado, cucumber, and thinly slice the red onion, then combine in a separate bowl.
Add the marinated shrimp to the vegetable mixture, gently fold to combine.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro over the bowl and drizzle a pinch of stevia powder for subtle sweetness.
Garnish with an extra lime wedge and optional crushed nuts for texture.
Serve immediately over a bed of mixed greens or plain quinoa if desired.
Enjoy a creamy, yeasty, low-glycemic Uruguayan shrimp bowl in under 30 minutes.
